title: Argo Rollout Spec
description: JSON Schema for the Argo Rollouts Rollout CRD, which enables progressive delivery strategies including canary and blue-green deployments with automated traffic management and analysis.

apiVersion.description: API version for Argo Rollouts resources.

name.description: Name of the Rollout resource, unique within its namespace.

RolloutSpec.title: RolloutSpec
RolloutSpec.description: Specification for an Argo Rollout defining the pod template, replica count, selector, and deployment strategy.

selector.description: Label selector for pods managed by this Rollout.

matchLabels.description: Map of label key-value pairs that pods must have.

template.description: Pod template specification for the Rollout pods.

minReadySeconds.description: Minimum number of seconds a pod must be ready before it is considered available.

revisionHistoryLimit.description: Number of old ReplicaSets to retain for rollback.

workloadRef.description: Reference to an existing Deployment to adopt as a Rollout.

apiVersion.description: API version of the referenced workload.

RolloutStrategy.title: RolloutStrategy
RolloutStrategy.description: Progressive delivery strategy configuration. Only one of canary or blueGreen may be specified.

CanaryStrategy.title: CanaryStrategy
CanaryStrategy.description: Canary deployment strategy that gradually shifts traffic to the new version using weighted routing steps.

steps.description: Ordered list of canary steps. Each step sets a traffic weight, pauses for manual approval or a duration, or runs an analysis.

maxSurge.description: Maximum number of pods that can be scheduled above the desired replica count during an update. Can be an integer or a percentage string.

maxUnavailable.description: Maximum number of pods that can be unavailable during an update. Can be an integer or percentage.

canaryService.description: Name of the Kubernetes Service to use for canary traffic.

stableService.description: Name of the Kubernetes Service to use for stable traffic.

CanaryStep.title: CanaryStep
CanaryStep.description: A single step in a canary deployment. One of setWeight, pause, analysis, or setCanaryScale should be specified.

setWeight.description: Percentage of traffic to route to the canary (new version). Value between 0 and 100.

pause.description: Pause the rollout for manual approval or a fixed duration.

duration.description: Duration to pause before automatically continuing (e.g., 5m, 1h). If omitted, pause is indefinite until manually resumed.

analysis.description: Run an AnalysisTemplate to evaluate metrics and determine whether to proceed.

args.description: Arguments to pass to the analysis template.

setCanaryScale.description: Set the scale of the canary ReplicaSet independently of traffic weight.

weight.description: Scale canary to this percentage of stable replicas.

replicas.description: Explicit replica count for the canary.

matchTrafficWeight.description: Scale canary to match the current traffic weight.

BlueGreenStrategy.title: BlueGreenStrategy
BlueGreenStrategy.description: Blue-green deployment strategy that maintains two environments (blue=stable, green=preview) and switches traffic atomically.

activeService.description: Name of the Kubernetes Service that receives live production traffic (blue).

previewService.description: Name of the Kubernetes Service that receives preview traffic (green) before promotion.

autoPromotionEnabled.description: Automatically promote the green ReplicaSet to active without manual approval.

autoPromotionSeconds.description: Seconds to wait before automatically promoting the green environment.

previewReplicaCount.description: Number of replicas to run in the preview (green) environment.

scaleDownDelaySeconds.description: Seconds to delay scaling down the old (blue) ReplicaSet after promotion.

RolloutAnalysis.title: RolloutAnalysis
RolloutAnalysis.description: Analysis configuration for running AnalysisTemplates during a rollout step.

templates.description: List of AnalysisTemplate references to run.

args.description: Arguments passed to the analysis templates.

valueFrom.description: Dynamic value sourced from a field reference.

RolloutTrafficRouting.title: RolloutTrafficRouting
RolloutTrafficRouting.description: Traffic routing configuration for canary deployments using a supported ingress controller or service mesh.

routes.description: Route names within the VirtualService to manage.

stableIngress.description: Name of the stable NGINX Ingress resource.

alb.description: AWS Application Load Balancer-based traffic routing.

ingress.description: Name of the ALB Ingress resource.

RolloutStatus.title: RolloutStatus
RolloutStatus.description: Observed status of an Argo Rollout.

currentPodHash.description: Pod template hash of the current (canary/green) ReplicaSet.

stablePodHash.description: Pod template hash of the stable ReplicaSet.

currentStepIndex.description: Index of the current canary step being executed.

updatedReplicas.description: Number of pods running the updated pod template.

availableReplicas.description: Number of available (ready for min readySeconds) pods.
